heading: Computations for Navy Reserve and Marine Corps Reserve: rule when fraction occurs in final result
label: 12010 Computations for Navy Reserve and Marine Corps Reserve: rule when fraction occurs in final result
text: When there is a fraction in the final result of any computation under this chapter for the Navy Reserve or the Marine Corps Reserve, a fraction of one-half or more is counted as one, and a fraction of less than one-half is disregarded.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 5454 of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1662(a)(3)
